title: 日本ダービーの後に・勝利と焦燥と

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: What's this?! The Phantom Bird swoops in!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This year's Derby champion is El Condor Pasa! El
Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's name echoes out from the
speaker, and the crowd roars with excitement. As
for our champion...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen her look so worn out. She certainly
doesn't look like someone who just won the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But... but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It was so close... If I had let my guard down for
even a second, I woulda been in trouble.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's how strong Spe was...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Congrats, El! I'm so bummed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you really gave it your all out there, huh?
Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How did you do it, Spe?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: How did you get so strong all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I've just been training a lot. I didn't do
anything special...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But you know... Since you were my opponent, I
felt like I had to do my very best on behalf of
everyone who trained with me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's why I could run so hard today.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You had to work hard for everyone...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The victory celebration is over, and El Condor
Pasa is spending some time in the park, looking
dejected.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From a distance, I watch Grass Wonder cheer her
up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Pick your head up, El. You won today. You should
be proud of yourself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You're really having a tough time, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At a loss, Grass Wonder walks towards me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yeah. She's usually so confident.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I think she's surprised by how close the race was,
even though she won.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She's always been so untouchable, so this must
have been a harsh wake-up call...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Can you take it from here, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Of course I'm worried. But...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As competitors, there are certain feelings we
can't share with each other. Or we ought not to,
rather.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So please... do what you can.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder leaves with a slight bow.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Have I been... too arrogant?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be an easy race. I'm aiming to
be the world's strongest racer, after all...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But Spe has gotten so strong... I couldn't let up at
all.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I keep saying I'm aiming for the world...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But am I really just taking the easy way out by not
competing with my friends?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If that's the case, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing can be discerned from a single match. I'm
not quite sure what to think of this one.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... I still won! That means... I'm the world's
strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So long as I'm wearing this mask, there isn't
anything to fear... or at least, there shouldn't be!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So that means our next race is...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Japan C-Cu... Cu...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She can't say it. It's clear that she's caught
between pride and reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's impossible to keep pushing forward like this.
We might want to add another step along the
way.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The Mainichi Okan? Well, it is before the fall G1...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The perfect fall G1 prelude—a 1,800-meter race
that seniors run in as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From there, she can advance to the Japan Cup,
the Triple Crown tour Kikuka Sho, or the Mile
Championship.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It feels kinda like... a cop-out. But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I understand. There's a lot I wanna think about
before fall...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her mask is slipping... She's wavering for the first
time on her road to becoming the world's
strongest racer.
